brand_identity.name: Livanespor
brand_identity.vibe: Elite European football club, Borussia Dortmund / AC Milan tier. Athletic, commanding, minimal.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. High contrast. Bento Grids for metrics and sponsors.

cards.marketing: bg-[#121212] border border-[#2a2a2a] p-6 lg:p-8 rounded-none md:rounded-xl shadow-2xl
cards.sponsors: bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-[#2a2a2a] hover:border-[#f5dc4c] transition-colors p-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg

motion.hero_entrance: Fade in and slide up (y: 30) over 0.8s, staggered children.
motion.scroll_reveal: framer-motion whileInView={ opacity: 1, y: 0 }, initial={ opacity: 0, y: 20 }, viewport={ once: true }.
motion.buttons: Micro-interactions: scale(0.95) on tap, slight translation on hover.

components.navigation: Crystal Glass effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) sticky top-0 z-50 with 1px bottom border border-white/10. Logo prominent, primary CTA in #f5dc4c.

buttons.primary: bg-[#f5dc4c] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none md:rounded-sm hover:bg-[#e3c93b] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#f5dc4c] text-[#f5dc4c] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#f5dc4c] hover:text-black transition-all

components.slider: Hero slider using Swiper or Embla. Full screen (100vh) with dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/50 to-transparent) so text is highly legible. Progress bar indicators.
components.cards: Cardless or sharp rectangular cards with 1px border. Avoid heavy rounded corners (max rounded-lg).
components.admin_dashboard: Shadcn based. Sidebar navigation. Dense tables. Use neutral surfaces (#121212) with white text. High contrast metrics.
components.academy_section: Visually distinct but shares DNA. Use #f5dc4c as dominant background with black text, or white background with black text and yellow accents, to cleanly separate from the dark-themed A-Team section.

images.description: Primary hero: Soccer player in yellow jersey kicking ball at night.
Secondary hero slider: Packed stadium night match.
Third hero slider: Soccer game in progress.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons for UI interactions. For Sponsors, use large lucide brand icons or simple vector shapes instead of text placeholders to maintain premium Bento grid look.

sections_checklist: Next Match Countdown & Last Match Score (Bento Grid layout)
Fast Metrics (react-countup, massive numbers in Bebas Neue)
Featured Players & Squad Showcase (Position filters, dark portrait cards)
Sponsor Showcase (Premium Bento grid cards with hover glow)
Academy Landing Page (Age groups, Schedule, Application Form - distinct but unified design)
Admin Login & Dashboard (Shadcn CRUD, clean UI, AI Image Gen Panel)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white/yellow text on black meets WCAG AA.
accessibility.focus: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#f5dc4c] on all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='squad-filter-fw').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme with #f5dc4c (Yellow) accents. Do NOT use purple, blue, or other generic AI colors.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the Marketing and Club sections for maximum layout freedom (Bento grids, overlapping).
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactivity (Dropdowns, Tabs) and exclusively for the Admin Dashboard.
Apply `data-testid` to all clickable elements and major layout sections.
For the Academy section, visually separate it from the Club section either by using a predominantly White/Gray background, or keeping it dark but with distinct layout patterns.
Ensure the Hero images have a gradient overlay to make the massive Bebas Neue text readable.
Load Bebas Neue and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.html.
Do NOT use placeholder text for Sponsors. Use Lucide brand icons (like Twitch, Trello, Apple) scaled up to look like genuine premium sponsors in the grid.
